title: Import all data from Contacts into Campaigns
excerpt:
Description
I’m testing the Campaigns feature and it doesn’t import all fields/columns from my Contacts Board - which won’t allow me to filter based on all information we already have from the customers. I would recommen…

posts.author: cfabre (Camila)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’m testing the Campaigns feature and it doesn’t import all fields/columns from my Contacts Board - which won’t allow me to filter based on all information we already have from the customers. I would recommend importing all so that we can segment our campaigns.

What are you trying to achieve

Automatic importation of all Contact Board data into Campaigns.

posts.author: cfabre (Camila)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tom

Yes, actually I did two videos and talked with your support team for a long time and they advised me to open this review at the community forum since they couldn’t find a solution and thought it was a limitation from the system.

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml:
Tom-CXmonday:

Hi Camila, thanks for your reply! I actually removed my previous reply because I realized I misunderstood you in the beginning. I thought you meant that the email adresses are not going through, but I then realized you meant that the rest of your contacts’ information isn’t being imported, which is actually expected since it’s currently not supported yet. We’re definitely working on it Thanks a lot for bringing this up

Hi Camila, thanks for your reply! I actually removed my previous reply because I realized I misunderstood you in the beginning. I thought you meant that the email adresses are not going through, but I then realized you meant that the rest of your contacts’ information isn’t being imported, which is actually expected since it’s currently not supported yet. We’re definitely working on it Thanks a lot for bringing this up
